text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Friday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, June 07. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. That's good medical feedback. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. School projects are fun. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need secure messaging immediately. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Got it, Mike. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Smart financial planning. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Understood. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Writing scripts to process image datasets. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. That sounds like a sweet moment. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've logged your vitals. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. He is doing so well. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Updating our financial spreadsheets. First United Mortgage offered 5.65% with zero points. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Budget tracking is updated. A rate of 5.65% is a big drop from 6.5%. I'll calculate your savings. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Writing up user stories for our upcoming sprint. Our Twilio integration is throwing 504 rate limit errors during signups. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good focus area. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. CareConnect prep is moving along. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
